name: get_post_analytics
description: Retrieve aggregate analytics across all posts in your publication, or detailed stats for a specific post. Includes email delivery, open rates, click rates, and unsubscribe metrics.

parameters.name: publication_id
parameters.description: The ID of your Beehiiv publication.

parameters.name: post_id
parameters.description: The ID of a specific post. Omit to get aggregate stats across all posts.
